title: picea abies var. ellwangeriana
intro: Picea abies var. ellwangeriana, also known as Ellwanger's spruce, is a cultivar of the Norway spruce tree that is prized for its unique characteristics and potential medicinal properties. The essential oil extracted from its needles has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ellwanger's spruce include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Picea abies var. ellwangeriana often involve steaming the needles to release the essential oils, which can then be used in aromatherapy, teas, or topical applications.
